EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeometry5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend the IGeometry interface with a more sophisticated projection method.

[Guid("134B247E-83F6-471C-9AD1-11C35312D5EF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometry5 : IGeometry4, IGeometry3, IGeometry2, IGeometry

CentroidEx

The center of gravity (centroid).

IPoint CentroidEx { get; }

IPoint
